Documentation

Documentation

21 technical reference documents covering Voyadores application modules, utilities, and plugins.

App Shell

3

Core shell-level features that handle browser configuration, navigation, and theming.

Browser & TZ Detection Detects browser type, version, and timezone for application configuration. Menu Web Dynamic web navigation menu management and rendering. Theme Picker Application theme selection and persistence.

Modules

6

Application modules that extend the Voyadores shell with specific user-facing features.

Default URL Manages the default landing URL per user role and context. Feature Onboarding Guided feature spotlight tours with step-by-step overlays. Notifications In-app notification system with polling, badge, and read states. Quick Links User-customizable shortcut link panel for quick navigation. User Onboarding First-run onboarding flow for new user account setup. Visual Indicator Status and progress indicators shown in the application shell.

Utilities

4

Low-level helpers for storage, HTTP, URI parsing, and ViewModel architecture.

Browser Storage Unified API for localStorage, sessionStorage, and cookie access. DateTime Picker jQuery-based date and time picker with Voyadores theme integration. Request & URI HTTP request helpers and URI parsing and construction utilities. ViewModelBase Base ViewModel class providing observable state and lifecycle hooks.

Plugins

8

Specialized components and editors integrated into the Voyadores application framework.

Action Button Manager State-aware toolbar button manager with permission control. Currency Picker Searchable currency selection dropdown with formatting. File Template Editor WYSIWYG and code editor for HTML and CSHTML file templates. Repeater Dynamic add/remove row repeater for form field groups. Table Plugin Data table with AJAX loading, sorting, filtering, and pagination. Template Editor Multi-section evaluation form builder, viewer, and dual-role review. Treeview Hierarchical tree navigation with expand/collapse support. Wizard Form Multi-step modal form wizard with progress bar and callbacks.
On this page
